name: Path Traversal / Local File Inclusion (LFI)
description: Tests for path traversal and local file inclusion by injecting directory traversal sequences (../) to access sensitive system files. Detects when the application returns contents of /etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, win.ini, or other sensitive files.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Validate and sanitize all file path inputs. Use a whitelist of allowed files. Implement chroot jails or containerization. Never concatenate user input with file system paths directly.

intelligence.dfirRelevance: LFI is used to read configuration files containing credentials, SSH keys, and database connection strings. Combined with log poisoning, LFI can escalate to RCE.
